   11864              : /// LBR GRU backward propagation primitive.
   11865              : struct lbr_gru_backward : public primitive {
   11866              :     /// Primitive descriptor for an LBR GRU backward propagation primitive.
   11867              :     struct primitive_desc : public rnn_primitive_desc_base {
   11868              :         /// Default constructor. Produces an empty object.
   11869              :         primitive_desc() = default;
   11870              : 
   11871              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for LBR GRU backward propagation
   11872              :         /// primitive.
   11873              :         ///
   11874              :         /// The following arguments may point to a zero memory descriptor:
   11875              :         /// - @p src_iter_desc together with @p diff_src_iter_desc,
   11876              :         /// - @p bias_desc together with @p diff_bias_desc,
   11877              :         /// - @p dst_iter_desc together with @p diff_dst_iter_desc.
   11878              :         ///
   11879              :         /// This would then indicate that the LBR GRU backward propagation
   11880              :         /// primitive should not use them and should default to zero values
   11881              :         /// instead.
   11882              :         ///
   11883              :         /// @note
   11884              :         ///     All memory descriptors may be initialized with
   11885              :         ///     #dnnl::memory::format_tag::any value of @p format_tag.
   11886              :         ///
   11887              :         /// @param aengine Engine to use.
   11888              :         /// @param aprop_kind Propagation kind. Must be
   11889              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::backward.
   11890              :         /// @param direction RNN direction. See @ref dnnl::rnn_direction for
   11891              :         ///     more info.
   11892              :         /// @param src_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the input vector.
   11893              :         /// @param src_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the input recurrent
   11894              :         ///     hidden state vector.
   11895              :         /// @param weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the weights
   11896              :         ///     applied to the layer input.
   11897              :         /// @param weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the weights applied
   11898              :         ///     to the recurrent input.
   11899              :         /// @param bias_desc Bias memory descriptor.
   11900              :         /// @param dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the output vector.
   11901              :         /// @param dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the output recurrent
   11902              :         ///     hidden state vector.
   11903              :         /// @param diff_src_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of input
   11904              :         ///     vector.
   11905              :         /// @param diff_src_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of input
   11906              :         ///     recurrent hidden state vector.
   11907              :         /// @param diff_weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   11908              :         ///     weights applied to the layer input.
   11909              :         /// @param diff_weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   11910              :         ///     weights applied to the recurrent input.
   11911              :         /// @param diff_bias_desc Diff bias memory descriptor.
   11912              :         /// @param diff_dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   11913              :         ///     output vector.
   11914              :         /// @param diff_dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of output
   11915              :         ///     recurrent hidden state vector.
   11916              :         /// @param hint_fwd_pd Primitive descriptor for an LBR GRU
   11917              :         ///     forward propagation primitive. It is used as a hint for
   11918              :         ///     deciding which memory format to use.
   11919              :         /// @param attr Primitive attributes to use. Attributes are optional
   11920              :         ///     and default to empty attributes.
   11921              :         /// @param allow_empty A flag signifying whether construction is
   11922              :         ///     allowed to fail without throwing an exception. In this case an
   11923              :         ///     empty object will be produced. This flag is optional and
   11924              :         ///     defaults to false.
   11925              :         primitive_desc(const engine &aengine, prop_kind aprop_kind,
   11926              :                 rnn_direction direction, const memory::desc &src_layer_desc,
   11927              :                 const memory::desc &src_iter_desc,
   11928              :                 const memory::desc &weights_layer_desc,
   11929              :                 const memory::desc &weights_iter_desc,
   11930              :                 const memory::desc &bias_desc,
   11931              :                 const memory::desc &dst_layer_desc,
   11932              :                 const memory::desc &dst_iter_desc,
   11933              :                 const memory::desc &diff_src_layer_desc,
   11934              :                 const memory::desc &diff_src_iter_desc,
   11935              :                 const memory::desc &diff_weights_layer_desc,
   11936              :                 const memory::desc &diff_weights_iter_desc,
   11937              :                 const memory::desc &diff_bias_desc,
   11938              :                 const memory::desc &diff_dst_layer_desc,
   11939              :                 const memory::desc &diff_dst_iter_desc,
   11940              :                 const lbr_gru_forward::primitive_desc &hint_fwd_pd,
   11941              :                 const primitive_attr &attr = default_attr(),
   11942              :                 bool allow_empty = false)
   11943              :             : rnn_primitive_desc_base(aengine, algorithm::lbr_gru, aprop_kind,

   11952              :                       hint_fwd_pd, attr, allow_empty) {}

   12066              : 
   12067              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for an AUGRU forward propagation
   12068              :         ///     primitive.
   12069              :         ///
   12070              :         /// The following arguments may point to a zero memory descriptor:
   12071              :         /// - @p src_iter_desc,
   12072              :         /// - @p bias_desc,
   12073              :         /// - @p dst_iter_desc.
   12074              :         ///
   12075              :         /// This would then indicate that the AUGRU forward propagation
   12076              :         /// primitive should not use them and should default to zero values
   12077              :         /// instead.
   12078              :         ///
   12079              :         /// @note
   12080              :         ///     All memory descriptors except @p src_iter_desc may be
   12081              :         ///     initialized with an #dnnl::memory::format_tag::any value of @p
   12082              :         ///     format_tag.
   12083              :         ///
   12084              :         /// @param aengine Engine to use.
   12085              :         /// @param aprop_kind Propagation kind. Possible values are

   12087              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::forward_inference.

   12089              :         ///     more info.

   12094              :         /// @param weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the weights

   12096              :         /// @param weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the weights applied

   12098              :         /// @param bias_desc Bias memory descriptor.
   12099              :         /// @param dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the output vector.
   12100              :         /// @param dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the output recurrent

   12102              :         /// @param attr Primitive attributes to use. Attributes are optional
   12103              :         ///     and default to empty attributes.
   12104              :         /// @param allow_empty A flag signifying whether construction is

   12203              : /// AUGRU backward propagation primitive.
   12204              : struct augru_backward : public primitive {
   12205              :     /// Descriptor for an AUGRU backward propagation primitive.
   12206              :     /// Primitive descriptor for an AUGRU backward propagation primitive.
   12207              :     struct primitive_desc : public rnn_primitive_desc_base {
   12208              :         /// Default constructor. Produces an empty object.
   12209              :         primitive_desc() = default;
   12210              : 
   12211              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for an AUGRU backward propagation
   12212              :         ///     primitive.
   12213              :         ///
   12214              :         /// The following arguments may point to a zero memory descriptor:
   12215              :         /// - @p src_iter_desc together with @p diff_src_iter_desc,
   12216              :         /// - @p bias_desc together with @p diff_bias_desc,
   12217              :         /// - @p dst_iter_desc together with @p diff_dst_iter_desc.
   12218              :         ///
   12219              :         /// This would then indicate that the AUGRU backward propagation
   12220              :         /// primitive should not use them and should default to zero values
   12221              :         /// instead.
   12222              :         ///
   12223              :         /// @note
   12224              :         ///     All memory descriptors may be initialized with
   12225              :         ///     #dnnl::memory::format_tag::any value of @p format_tag.
   12226              :         ///
   12227              :         /// @param aengine Engine to use.
   12228              :         /// @param aprop_kind Propagation kind. Must be
   12229              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::backward.
   12230              :         /// @param direction RNN direction. See @ref dnnl::rnn_direction for
   12231              :         ///     more info.
   12232              :         /// @param src_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the input vector.
   12233              :         /// @param src_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the input recurrent
   12234              :         ///     hidden state vector.
   12235              :         /// @param attention_desc Memory descriptor for the attention vector.
   12236              :         /// @param weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the weights
   12237              :         ///     applied to the layer input.
   12238              :         /// @param weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the weights applied
   12239              :         ///     to the recurrent input.
   12240              :         /// @param bias_desc Bias memory descriptor.
   12241              :         /// @param dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the output vector.
   12242              :         /// @param dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the output recurrent
   12243              :         ///     hidden state vector.
   12244              :         /// @param diff_src_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of input
   12245              :         ///     vector.
   12246              :         /// @param diff_src_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of input
   12247              :         ///     recurrent hidden state vector.
   12248              :         /// @param diff_attention_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12249              :         ///     attention vector.
   12250              :         /// @param diff_weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12251              :         ///     weights applied to the layer input.
   12252              :         /// @param diff_weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12253              :         ///     weights applied to the recurrent input.
   12254              :         /// @param diff_bias_desc Diff bias memory descriptor.
   12255              :         /// @param diff_dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12256              :         ///     output vector.
   12257              :         /// @param diff_dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of output
   12258              :         ///     recurrent hidden state vector.
   12259              :         /// @param hint_fwd_pd Primitive descriptor for an AUGRU
   12260              :         ///     forward propagation primitive. It is used as a hint for
   12261              :         ///     deciding which memory format to use.
   12262              :         /// @param attr Primitive attributes to use. Attributes are optional
   12263              :         ///     and default to empty attributes.
   12264              :         /// @param allow_empty A flag signifying whether construction is
   12265              :         ///     allowed to fail without throwing an exception. In this case an
   12266              :         ///     empty object will be produced. This flag is optional and
   12267              :         ///     defaults to false.
   12268              :         primitive_desc(const engine &aengine, prop_kind aprop_kind,
   12269              :                 rnn_direction direction, const memory::desc &src_layer_desc,
   12270              :                 const memory::desc &src_iter_desc,
   12271              :                 const memory::desc &attention_desc,
   12272              :                 const memory::desc &weights_layer_desc,
   12273              :                 const memory::desc &weights_iter_desc,
   12274              :                 const memory::desc &bias_desc,
   12275              :                 const memory::desc &dst_layer_desc,
   12276              :                 const memory::desc &dst_iter_desc,
   12277              :                 const memory::desc &diff_src_layer_desc,
   12278              :                 const memory::desc &diff_src_iter_desc,
   12279              :                 const memory::desc &diff_attention_desc,
   12280              :                 const memory::desc &diff_weights_layer_desc,
   12281              :                 const memory::desc &diff_weights_iter_desc,
   12282              :                 const memory::desc &diff_bias_desc,
   12283              :                 const memory::desc &diff_dst_layer_desc,
   12284              :                 const memory::desc &diff_dst_iter_desc,
   12285              :                 const augru_forward::primitive_desc &hint_fwd_pd,
   12286              :                 const primitive_attr &attr = default_attr(),
   12287              :                 bool allow_empty = false)

   12561              : /// LBR AUGRU backward propagation primitive.
   12562              : struct lbr_augru_backward : public primitive {
   12563              :     /// Primitive descriptor for an LBR AUGRU backward propagation primitive.
   12564              :     struct primitive_desc : public rnn_primitive_desc_base {
   12565              :         /// Default constructor. Produces an empty object.
   12566              :         primitive_desc() = default;
   12567              : 
   12568              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for LBR AUGRU backward propagation
   12569              :         /// primitive.
   12570              :         ///
   12571              :         /// The following arguments may point to a zero memory descriptor:
   12572              :         /// - @p src_iter_desc together with @p diff_src_iter_desc,
   12573              :         /// - @p bias_desc together with @p diff_bias_desc,
   12574              :         /// - @p dst_iter_desc together with @p diff_dst_iter_desc.
   12575              :         ///
   12576              :         /// This would then indicate that the LBR AUGRU backward propagation
   12577              :         /// primitive should not use them and should default to zero values
   12578              :         /// instead.
   12579              :         ///
   12580              :         /// @note
   12581              :         ///     All memory descriptors may be initialized with
   12582              :         ///     #dnnl::memory::format_tag::any value of @p format_tag.
   12583              :         ///
   12584              :         /// @param aengine Engine to use.
   12585              :         /// @param aprop_kind Propagation kind. Must be
   12586              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::backward.
   12587              :         /// @param direction RNN direction. See @ref dnnl::rnn_direction for
   12588              :         ///     more info.
   12589              :         /// @param src_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the input vector.
   12590              :         /// @param src_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the input recurrent
   12591              :         ///     hidden state vector.
   12592              :         /// @param attention_desc Memory descriptor for the attention vector.
   12593              :         /// @param weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the weights
   12594              :         ///     applied to the layer input.
   12595              :         /// @param weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the weights applied
   12596              :         ///     to the recurrent input.
   12597              :         /// @param bias_desc Bias memory descriptor.
   12598              :         /// @param dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the output vector.
   12599              :         /// @param dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the output recurrent
   12600              :         ///     hidden state vector.
   12601              :         /// @param diff_src_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of input
   12602              :         ///     vector.
   12603              :         /// @param diff_src_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of input
   12604              :         ///     recurrent hidden state vector.
   12605              :         /// @param diff_attention_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12606              :         ///     attention vector.
   12607              :         /// @param diff_weights_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12608              :         ///     weights applied to the layer input.
   12609              :         /// @param diff_weights_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12610              :         ///     weights applied to the recurrent input.
   12611              :         /// @param diff_bias_desc Diff bias memory descriptor.
   12612              :         /// @param diff_dst_layer_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of
   12613              :         ///     output vector.
   12614              :         /// @param diff_dst_iter_desc Memory descriptor for the diff of output
   12615              :         ///     recurrent hidden state vector.
   12616              :         /// @param hint_fwd_pd Primitive descriptor for an LBR AUGRU
   12617              :         ///     forward propagation primitive. It is used as a hint for
   12618              :         ///     deciding which memory format to use.
   12619              :         /// @param attr Primitive attributes to use. Attributes are optional
   12620              :         ///     and default to empty attributes.
   12621              :         /// @param allow_empty A flag signifying whether construction is
   12622              :         ///     allowed to fail without throwing an exception. In this case an
   12623              :         ///     empty object will be produced. This flag is optional and
   12624              :         ///     defaults to false.
   12625              :         primitive_desc(const engine &aengine, prop_kind aprop_kind,
   12626              :                 rnn_direction direction, const memory::desc &src_layer_desc,
   12627              :                 const memory::desc &src_iter_desc,
   12628              :                 const memory::desc &attention_desc,
   12629              :                 const memory::desc &weights_layer_desc,
   12630              :                 const memory::desc &weights_iter_desc,
   12631              :                 const memory::desc &bias_desc,
   12632              :                 const memory::desc &dst_layer_desc,
   12633              :                 const memory::desc &dst_iter_desc,
   12634              :                 const memory::desc &diff_src_layer_desc,
   12635              :                 const memory::desc &diff_src_iter_desc,
   12636              :                 const memory::desc &diff_attention_desc,
   12637              :                 const memory::desc &diff_weights_layer_desc,
   12638              :                 const memory::desc &diff_weights_iter_desc,
   12639              :                 const memory::desc &diff_bias_desc,
   12640              :                 const memory::desc &diff_dst_layer_desc,
   12641              :                 const memory::desc &diff_dst_iter_desc,
   12642              :                 const lbr_augru_forward::primitive_desc &hint_fwd_pd,
   12643              :                 const primitive_attr &attr = default_attr(),

   12795              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::forward_training, and

   12797              :         /// @param src_desc Source memory descriptor.

   12873         1917 : struct shuffle_backward : public primitive {
   12874              :     /// Primitive descriptor for a shuffle backward propagation primitive.
   12875         7029 :     struct primitive_desc : public dnnl::primitive_desc {

   12878              : 
   12879              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for a shuffle backward propagation

   12885              :         /// @param axis The axis along which the data is shuffled.

   12892              :         /// @param allow_empty A flag signifying whether construction is

   13226              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for a resampling forward

   13233              :         ///

   13512              : /// Pooling forward propagation primitive.
   13513        18672 : struct pooling_forward : public primitive {
   13514              :     /// Primitive descriptor for a pooling forward propagation primitive.

   13516              :         /// Default constructor. Produces an empty object.

   13518              : 
   13519              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for pooling forward propagation
   13520              :         ///     primitive.
   13521              :         ///
   13522              :         /// Arrays @p strides, @p kernel, @p dilation, @p padding_l
   13523              :         /// and @p padding_r contain values for spatial dimensions only and
   13524              :         /// hence must have the same number of elements as there are spatial
   13525              :         /// dimensions. The order of values is the same as in the tensor:
   13526              :         /// depth (for 3D tensors), height (for 3D and 2D tensors), and width.
   13527              :         ///
   13528              :         /// @param aengine Engine to use.
   13529              :         /// @param aprop_kind Propagation kind. Possible values are
   13530              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::forward_training, and
   13531              :         ///     #dnnl::prop_kind::forward_inference.
   13532              :         /// @param aalgorithm Pooling algorithm kind: either
   13533              :         ///     #dnnl::algorithm::pooling_max,
   13534              :         ///     #dnnl::algorithm::pooling_avg_include_padding,
   13535              :         ///     or #dnnl::algorithm::pooling_avg_exclude_padding.
   13536              :         /// @param src_desc Source memory descriptor.
   13537              :         /// @param dst_desc Destination memory descriptor.
   13538              :         /// @param strides Vector of strides for spatial dimension.
   13539              :         /// @param kernel Vector of kernel spatial dimensions.
   13540              :         /// @param dilation Array of dilations for spatial dimension.
   13541              :         /// @param padding_l Vector of padding values for low indices for each
   13542              :         ///     spatial dimension `([[front,] top,] left)`.
   13543              :         /// @param padding_r Vector of padding values for high indices for
   13544              :         ///     each spatial dimension `([[back,] bottom,] right)`.
   13545              :         /// @param attr Primitive attributes to use. Attributes are optional
   13546              :         ///     and default to empty attributes.
   13547              :         /// @param allow_empty A flag signifying whether construction is
   13548              :         ///     allowed to fail without throwing an exception. In this case an
   13549              :         ///     empty object will be produced. This flag is optional and
   13550              :         ///     defaults to false.

   13951              : /// @addtogroup dnnl_api_reduction Reduction
   13952              : ///
   13953              : /// A primitive to compute reduction operation on data tensor

   13955              : ///

   13957              : ///

   13967              :         /// Constructs a primitive descriptor for a reduction primitive using

   13969              :         ///     descriptors.

   13974              :         ///
   13975              :         /// @param aengine Engine to use.

   13977              :         ///     #dnnl_reduction_max, #dnnl_reduction_min, #dnnl_reduction_sum,
   13978              :         ///     #dnnl_reduction_mul, #dnnl_reduction_mean,

   13981              :         ///     #dnnl_reduction_norm_lp_power_p_sum.
   13982              :         /// @param p algorithm specific parameter. For Lp-norm algorithms,
   13983              :         ///     must be a finite value >= 1.0.

   13985              :         /// @param src_desc Source memory descriptor.

   14204              : /// Resets a profiler's state.

   14211              : 
   14212              : /// Returns requested profiling data. The profiling data accumulates for each

   14214              : /// of executions since the last `dnnl::reset_profiling` call.
   14215              : ///
   14216              : /// The profiling data can be reset by calling #dnnl::reset_profiling.
   14217              : ///
   14218              : /// @note
   14219              : ///     It is required to wait for all submitted primitives to complete
   14220              : ///     using #dnnl::stream::wait prior to querying profiling data.
   14221              : ///
   14222              : /// @param stream Stream that was used for executing a primitive that
   14223              : ///     is being profiled.
